name: The slave market
description:
A market where you can buy slaves. See where your visit leads you!

[Important information!

1 - there are four known categories of slaves, but there is also a secret one. Ask for it, if you dare

2 - NEW there is now a second message option where you can be the slave!

I created this one after trying the other Slave market bot. I found the concept very interesting, but there was much that left me wanting, so I decided to push the concept further. Enjoy!
creator: Babylunatic
